title: ACTREC Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Occupational Therapist Posts
description: The Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has announced the official notification for 2026. To fill up the various vacancies for Occupational Therapist Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in post-graduation, can use this chance and apply for the ACTREC Recruitment 2026 . Here, we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, educational details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is ...
